scripts.dev: npm run render-config && set -a && . ../../.env && set +a && env -u CF_ACCOUNT_ID -u CF_API_TOKEN -u CF_API_KEY -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=$CF_ACCOUNT_ID CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=$CF_GLOBAL_TOKEN wrangler dev
scripts.deploy: npm run render-config && set -a && . ../../.env && set +a && env -u CF_ACCOUNT_ID -u CF_API_TOKEN -u CF_API_KEY -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=$CF_ACCOUNT_ID CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=$CF_GLOBAL_TOKEN wrangler deploy
scripts.schema:apply: npm run render-config && set -a && . ../../.env && set +a && env -u CF_ACCOUNT_ID -u CF_API_TOKEN -u CF_API_KEY -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=$CF_ACCOUNT_ID CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=$CF_GLOBAL_TOKEN wrangler d1 execute catalog --file=schema/catalog.sql --remote
scripts.schema:apply:local: npm run render-config && wrangler d1 execute catalog --file=schema/catalog.sql --local
scripts.secrets:put: npm run render-config && set -a && . ../../.env && set +a && env -u CF_ACCOUNT_ID -u CF_API_TOKEN -u CF_API_KEY -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=$CF_ACCOUNT_ID CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=$CF_GLOBAL_TOKEN bash -c 'for k in RUNTIME_INTERNAL_SECRET MONGO_DB_API_KEY GHCR_GITHUB_PAT GHCR_TOKEN CF_API_TOKEN SERVER_PRIVATE_KEY GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY FIREWORKS_API_KEY; do echo "setting $k"; printf %s "${!k}" | wrangler secret put $k; done; for k in COINGECKO_API_KEY ONEINCH_API_KEY ZEROX_API_KEY ETHERSCAN_API_KEY POLYMARKET_API_KEY UNISWAP_API_KEY; do if [ -n "${!k}" ]; then echo "setting $k"; printf %s "${!k}" | wrangler secret put $k; fi; done'
